name: Cubic Corporation
description: Cubic Corporation is a technology-driven provider of systems and services for the global transportation and defense markets. The company operates through two primary business segments: Cubic Transportation Systems (CTS) and Cubic Mission and Performance Solutions (CMPS). CTS is a leading integrator of payment and information systems and services for intelligent travel applications, while CMPS provides networked command, control, communications, computers, intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance (C4ISR) capabilities, as well as realistic military training systems. Cubic is dedicated to delivering innovation and integrating technologies to solve its customers' most challenging problems.
